signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts of 2.4% | YES | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, but fell short of market expectations of 2.4%, signaling contained price pressures amid global energy volatility from the Iran conflict.[1]
